name: Beet Box Cafe
tagline: Plant-powered cafe in Kailua with the best oat milk lattes and acai bowls on the Windward side.
mustOrder: golden turmeric latte — anti-inflammatory and delicious
acai bowl with local honey and granola
parking: Small lot in front; additional parking on Hahani St
talkStory: A 100% plant-based cafe founded by a North Shore surfer committed to clean eating done right. They source produce from Windward-side farms whenever possible, and the golden turmeric latte uses fresh-ground turmeric root with house-made oat milk — miles better than the powdered versions elsewhere. A Kailua institution for yoga instructors, Crossfit regulars, and Lanikai moms who’ve made this their post-workout ritual. The acai bowls are thick and loaded, not the watered-down tourist kind.
